preferred_architecture: H — Hybrid: Header-Anchored Crop + Structured Monetary Binding + Validator Gate

risks.mitigation: Structured schema forces separate gross/discount/net fields; binder rejects unit≈discount_pct (Rule B)
residual_cases: Prosciutto refined: qty 4, unit €9.17, total €36.54 (arithmetically closed)
Pomodor: qty 2, unit €20, total €40 (= 2×20 DESC column)

risks.risk: Rule A false positives on legitimate discount lines
risks.likelihood: HIGH if Rule A used alone
risks.mitigation: Never use Rule A alone; scope A only when discount_pct absent; prefer Rule B + E

risks.risk: Header crop regression on non-Emporio layouts
risks.mitigation: Extend TABLE_TOP_MARGIN conditionally when headerTop detected above crop top; regression-test Bidfood/Aviludo crops

risks.risk: GPT still mis-binds columns despite headers (Bocconcino)
risks.mitigation: Structured output + deterministic binder; targeted row retry with narrowed prompt
risks.audit_source: column-selection-deep-dive: crop NOT ambiguous, GPT still reads DESC as unit

risks.mitigation: Keep reconcileLineItemAmounts preservation of discounted totals; separate validator paths
risks.audit_source: discount-line-audit: GPT run variance, not column shift

risks.mitigation: Row-level retry only on flagged rows (~≤10% rows); avoid 5× full-invoice retry

risks.risk: VL GT mismatch vs visible invoice (Prosciutto total €35.14 vs €36.54)
risks.mitigation: Bind to visible Preço Total column; do not derive from GT; document GT catalog drift separately
Rule E neighbour inconsistency + row-scoped crops on retry

highlights.top_mitigated: R4 via structured binding + Rule B (0 FP on Pomodor €20)
highlights.top_residual: R1 — requires column metadata, not arithmetic alone
highlights.do_not_do: Rule A alone; full-invoice 5× retry; prompt-only for Bocconcino
